759.reason: [Error: Should check s.charAt(i) == '\n' instead of i == '\n']

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: Should check s.charAt(i) == '\n' instead of i == '\n']
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: should be s.charAt(i) == '\n' instead of i == '\n']
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.25 , reason:  [Error: should be `if (s.charAt(i) == '\n')`. This condition never becomes true as i is an index, not a character.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  [Incorrectly compares the integer index i with the character '\n', should be s.charAt(i) == '\n']
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Compares the loop index integer 'i' with the character literal '\n' instead of checking the actual character at that position (s.charAt(i) == '\n'), causing incorrect line number tracking.

905.reason: Accesses s.charAt(i + 1) without verifying if i + 1 is within the string bounds, which will throw a StringIndexOutOfBoundsException if '&' appears at the end of the file.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.25 , reason:  Potential StringIndexOutOfBoundsException if i+1 is out of bounds
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  [Missing bounds check for i + 1 < s.length(), which may cause StringIndexOutOfBoundsException if '&' is the last character in the file]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Accesses s.charAt(i + 1) without verifying if i + 1 is within the string bounds, which will throw a StringIndexOutOfBoundsException if '&' appears at the end of the file.

906.code: Token tmptoken = new Token("&&", Token.TokenType.AND, num);
906.reason: [Error: Should create token with "&" not "&&" for single '&' character]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.25 , reason:  Incorrect token description: should be "&" not "&&"
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  [The token description should be "&" instead of "&&" to preserve the exact erroneous source character as required]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: Should create token with "&" not "&&" for single '&' character]

744.reason: [Error: line number counter should start at 1, not 0. According to the problem, line numbers start from 1.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.25 , reason:  [Error: line number counter should start at 1, not 0. According to the problem, line numbers start from 1.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  [Line numbers should start from 1 according to the problem description, so num should be initialized to 1]

760.reason: [Error: For an isolated '&', the description should be "&" (not "&&") and the token type should not be AND. The error type 'a' is correctly set, but the token itself should represent the erroneous single character.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.25 , reason:  [Error: For an isolated '&', the description should be "&" (not "&&") and the token type should not be AND. The error type 'a' is correctly set, but the token itself should represent the erroneous single character.]
